title: US-China Relations Impact "Destiny Of Mankind": Xi Jinping
description: Chinese President Xi Jinping said on Monday that China-US ties would impact the "destiny of mankind", as he met with a group of American senators in Beijing.
snippet:
Mr Schumer told Xi Jinping that "our countries, together, will shape this century". (Representational)
